title: Acetosella xiphophylla

The genus Acetosella is often considered a subgroup of Oxalis, and its classification may vary depending on the source. Acetosella xiphophylla is native to tropical Africa and is known for its distinctive leaves and flowers. The classification of Acetosella xiphophylla is still a subject of ongoing research and debate.
